DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, DELMY AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, JOE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-10-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF DELMY FLORES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
